message:
fix(web): use monospace pre for SSH key prompt preview

The SSH key setup box in the wizard was rendering with broken ASCII
borders due to inconsistent Unicode character widths in web fonts.
Box-drawing characters (╔═╗║╚╝) have varying widths depending on
the font, causing misalignment.

Solution: Switch to simple horizontal lines using only `═` characters
wrapped in a `<pre>` tag, which ensures proper monospace rendering
and consistent alignment across all browsers and fonts.

This matches the actual installer output that users will see in their
terminal, improving the preview accuracy.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
